calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) as to Defendants Kanee Williams and DOES 1-15.
